text: No person shall cause or knowingly permit his child, ward, or employee under the age of 18 years to drive a motor vehicle upon the highways unless such child, ward, or employee is then licensed under this code.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 4. Violation of License Provisions [14600 - 14611]
##### § 14607

No person shall cause or knowingly permit his child, ward, or employee under the age of 18 years to drive a motor vehicle upon the highways unless such child, ward, or employee is then licensed under this code.

*(Amended by Stats. 1971, Ch. 1748.)*

subsections.text: No person shall cause or knowingly permit his child, ward, or employee under the age of 18 years to drive a motor vehicle upon the highways unless such child, ward, or employee is then licensed under this code.
